title: pyrus cydonia var. maliformis
intro: Pyrus cydonia var. maliformis, also known as the quince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The quince is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, due to the presence of anthraquinones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of quince include relief from symptoms of IBS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome), as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve overall cardiovascular health. Quince is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and jams, as well as in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy in these applications.
